author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The giant squid swims using jet propulsion, forcing water out of a muscular siphon to shoot backwards through the sea.
Giant giant squids have the largest eyes of any living animal, measuring up to 10 inches across to help them detect faint light in the deep ocean.
